mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_outbound_channel(tenant_id, org_id, name, type, enabled, config_json, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{configJson}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_channel WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM iot_outbound_channel WHERE is_delete = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iot_outbound_channel WHERE is_delete = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_outbound_channel SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, enabled = #{enabled}, config_json = #{configJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_outbound_channel SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
